macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Sees $229M in Liquidations as Short Positions Hit Hardest
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market experienced $229 million in liquidations over 24 hours, with short positions losing $142 million. Bitcoin led with $64.41 million in liquidations, followed by Ethereum at $33.20 million, affecting over 153,000 traders.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops Below $71K as US-Iran Tensions Escalate
items.summary: Bitcoin fell from weekend highs above $74,000 to $70,540 after US-Iran peace talks collapsed and President Trump ordered a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. The asset has recovered slightly to around $70,877, reflecting broader market sensitivity to geopolitical risk and oil prices.

items.title: Crypto Market Pulls Back 2.3% as Safe-Haven Demand Rises
items.summary: The $2.42 trillion crypto market declined 2.3% over 24 hours amid geopolitical tensions in Iran. Bitcoin retreated from above $73K to around $71K, marking the third pullback from consolidation range resistance, though it remains above the 50-day moving average.

items.title: Senate Returns to Resume CLARITY Act Crypto Legislation Negotiations
items.summary: The US Senate returned from Easter recess with the Banking Committee targeting a CLARITY Act markup in the final two weeks of April. Senator Bernie Moreno warned that if the bill doesn't reach the Senate floor by May, crypto legislation will likely be shelved for the remainder of 2026 due to midterm election politics.

items.title: BitMine Begins Trading on NYSE as Ethereum Mining Gains Institutional Traction
items.summary: BitMine, the largest mining company holding Ethereum on its balance sheet, has begun trading on the New York Stock Exchange. CEO Tom Lee described the listing as an important milestone for the company.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Claude Opus 4.7 Leaked with Anthropic Full-Stack App and New GPT Model Rumors
items.summary: Reports indicate a potential Claude Opus 4.7 leak from Anthropic, alongside their new full-stack AI studio, Claude Code updates, a rumored GPT Image Gen v2 from OpenAI, and the controversial MiniMax M2.7 open-source release.

items.title: AI Agent Swarms Revolutionize Multi-Agent Systems from Abacus AI
items.summary: Abacus AI demonstrates AI agent swarms that replace single AI agents, enabling parallel execution of tasks across apps, research, and operations with high precision and autonomy.

items.title: India Files Record 1.43 Lakh Patents in One Year, Boosting AI and Tech Innovation
items.summary: India achieved a 30% increase in patent filings to 1.43 lakh in a year, driven by institutions like IIT Madras, reflecting a surge in innovation including AI-related intellectual property.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Japan Approves Additional $4 Billion for Chipmaker Rapidus
items.summary: Japan has approved an extra $4 billion in funding for Rapidus, a domestic chipmaker, to bolster semiconductor production capabilities.

items.title: US Judge Blocks Arizona Criminal Case Against Prediction Market Kalshi at CFTC's Request
items.summary: A US judge has blocked a criminal case in Arizona against Kalshi, a prediction market platform, following a request from the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC).

items.title: MeitY Proposes Including Users and Social Firms in Content-Blocking Hearings
items.summary: India's Ministry of Electronics and IT (MeitY) is proposing amendments to IT rules to allow users and internet intermediaries to participate in content-blocking hearings, following stakeholder consultations.

items.title: Unknown iOS Flaw Accidentally Revealed by FBI Investigation
items.summary: An FBI investigation has inadvertently exposed an unknown vulnerability in iOS, leading to sensitive data exposure.

items.title: Millions of Brits Face Four-Hour Airport Waits as New Rules Go Live
items.summary: New airport security rules are causing four-hour wait times for millions of British travelers amid the holiday season.
